title: trifolium purpureum subsp. roussaeanum
intro: Trifolium purpureum subsp. roussaeanum, also known as purple clover, is a subspecies of clover that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of purple clover are attributed to its high content of isoflavones, which may help alleviate menopausal symptoms, improve cardiovascular health, and support bone health. Purple clover can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
